name: Fallout 4
description: From Bethesda Game Studios, the award-winning creators of Starfield and The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim, comes Fallout 4. A landmark in open-world RPG design and winner of over 200 ‘Best Of’ honors, including the DICE and BAFTA Game of the Year.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7/8/10 (64-bit OS required)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-2300 2.8 GHz/AMD Phenom II X4 945 3.0 GHz or equivalent
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 550 Ti 2GB/AMD Radeon HD 7870 2GB or equivalent
  • Storage: 30 GB available space
comment1: This game wasn't the greatest when it launched, but modders did their best to make it a better experience. Eventually they made it a decent game through their work. Bethesda, egotistical children that they are, couldn't stand that somebody made their game better than them and released a patch that made the game worse and nuked the mods. Two years later, they did the same thing again just to make sure they got rid of anybody who still had the will to dis-enshittify their product. As always, Bethesda takes every chance they get to cut of their nose in order to spite their face.
comment2: It's a fairly good game except the developers can't stop messing with ♥♥♥♥ and keep ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ up everyone's mod lists. I can't play it right now because of the update they just did and won't be able to until certain mods get updated. Was this update necessary? no it was not. This is a pattern with these developers and it's getting really annoying. I've half a mind to uninstall this game simply because I'm tired of this pattern.
comment3:
I would rather ♥♥♥♥ in my hands and clap than play this ♥♥♥♥ anymore. They only update this game to ragebait mod players and suck the wrinkly ♥♥♥♥♥ of people who pay for creation club.

This game is ELEVEN YEARS OLD, stop pissing on it with your useless updates.
